message:
refactor(clickup): update provisioning recipe to new fcp-core API

Migrate from add_step() to with_step(), remove description parameter
from ProvisioningStep::new(), update PromptSecret to use message field
and StoreSecret to include value_from reference. Aligns with fcp-core
provisioning API v2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
